div.p: Module: M3 Replication & Consistency Spec: IEEE-2988 Distributed Consensus

ul.li: LeaderLease verified (must be held by primary).
Data replicated to secondaries via ConnectionPool.
ACK returned once QuorumSize is reached.
PhiAccrualDetector tracks inter-arrival times of heartbeats.
If Phi > 8.0, FailureDetector marks node as SUSPECT.
ReplicationGroups initiates promotion of secondary with highest LastSyncIndex.
LeaderLease on dead node expires, allowing new primary to Acquire().
ConnectionPool reduces handshake overhead for high-frequency internal RPCs.
